description: v0.1.4 — Aligned core/cli release, gate verify transition contract, init template boundary cleanup.
changelog:
**Aligned @blxzer/cursor-trellis + @blxzer/cursor-trellis-core at 0.1.4.**

### Added
- feat(cli): gate verify transition contract — Parent archive, Full Child accept, `record-gate` placeholder rejection, integrate-through guards (7 integration tests).
- feat(guides): `cursor-context-injection-guide.md` shipped on `trellis init` (fixes index dead link).

### Changed
- fix(init): scripts written from `getAllScripts()` only (same as `trellis update`) — no longer copies maintainer probe/eval files into user projects.
- refactor(templates): user-facing guides stripped of MyHarness / `packages/cli` / rsync maintainer prose; `workflow.md` release-execution section removed from default init.
- chore(scripts): removed `aggregate_retrieval_telemetry.py` and `batch_plan_envelope.py` from shipped templates (maintainer eval tools).

### Upgrade notes
- Run `trellis update` in each project. If `.trellis/scripts/` still contains probe or telemetry scripts from an older init, update removes stale paths not in `getAllScripts()`.
- **Behavior change:** `task.py archive --check` and Parent/Child gate flows are stricter — see gate integration tests and release notes.
notes: First npm release with core and cli on the same version since 0.1.2.
